dj_text: Mm, Wii Sports Theme (Medieval Cover). Now let's slow it down a bit with Macarena (Medieval Cover).
commercial_text: This break was supposed to be an ad but we forgot to sell one. So here's 10 seconds of me making mouth noises. mmm.
hijack_text: EXTREME VOLUME RADIO FROM THE SCREAMING DIMENSION!
recovery_text: We're back from the void. Don't touch that dial.
title: Macarena (Medieval Cover)
